title: citrus juko
intro: Citrus juko, also known as the Japanese yuzu or Chinese yuja, is a small, evergreen tree native to East Asia, characterized by its small, yellow or greenish-yellow fruits that resemble a combination of a grapefruit and an orange. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of vitamin C and flavonoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of citrus juko include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. Citrus juko is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and juices, which can be consumed fresh or dried for later use.
